title: UAE offers free Fazaa membership in ‘Year of Family 2026’: Who can apply
summary_full: UAE residents with children are set to receive free Fazaa memberships in 2026, a move by the government to boost social cohesion and ease living costs. This initiative, part of the 'Year of the Family,' offers extensive discounts on retail, dining, travel and entertainment, recognising families' contributions and fostering community well-being.
